name: @radzor/queue-worker
description: In-memory job queue with workers, retries, and dead-letter handling. No external dependencies.

events.name: onJobComplete
events.description: Fired when a job completes successfully

events.name: onJobFailed
events.description: Fired when a job fails after all retries

actions.name: addJob
actions.description: Add a job to the queue

actions.name: process
actions.description: Register a worker function to process jobs
